violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The lactic acid concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the lactic acid must be 704-1875 ppm. Establishment will use chlorine until lactic acid dispenser is serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The door to the outside, located on the side AND back of building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
Inspector observed handwashing paper towel dispenser installed above ice well. Establishment to move dispenser over hand-sink to avoid hands dripping on ice. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the lactic acid sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The door to the basement toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The receptacle in the basement toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2025

The walk-in fan covers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The walls in the basement area is in poor repair (openings). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
